chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-563 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 02-12-2022 Mr. Mukhtiar Ali Shahani advocate for applicant along with applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh along with Inspector Noor Hassan Chhachhar SHO PS Khudaabad District Dadu. Mr. Safdar Ali Charan advocate for respondents No.4to6. Applicant has challenged impugned order dated 11.08.2022 whereby his application under section 22-A & B Cr.P.C. for registration of FIR against respondents has been dismissed. SHO PS Khudabad is present submits that no offence has been committed and there is dispute between parties over some agricultural land which prima facie is entered in the name of respondents. I have heard the parties. No case for indulgence is made out in above facts and circumstances. The provision of alternative remedy in the shape of direct complaint is available to the applicant to avail to boot. Accordingly, this application is dismissed. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
